name: A BlackSwan
media_url: For you, a million times would still fall short..  Meeting you was a fate, A fate that today has become my most blessed destiny.  With the little time we shared — Ah ! How intensely it lives within me! It's a story I could recount for a decade, Yet never truly complete.  Don't you dare ask me how? Here's what I would say: how not? You took me to a road I could never have reached on my own. Which road was it, and where did you take me?  Oh, don't you dare deny how warm you were with me. Don't you dare deny how much of your heart you poured into — Reading me, Listening to me, Understanding me, And valuing me in ways I had never experienced- –Not even from myself. This is my truth of who you've been to me. And I know you have your own.  But the weight of how I felt– Being treated so dearly by you, Is so profound that I immersed myself in your words– Words that led me to meet my core self. I knocked on my soul's door. Unaware it would open to find a friend–A soul friend, so early and in the most unplanned way.  That knock granted me access: To see how sincerely I could adore, How deeply I could feel, How intensely I could fall, How much of fondness I could hold, And how profoundly affection could draw me, Not to anyone, But to you! Ever since I became human.  Greeting your soul taught me– Who my soul friend could be. And what if I told you– It was with you I ever felt so deeply connected. After experiencing such a gravity toward you. I felt as though we were destined–soulmates.  If only for that fleeting time. Even now, I nurture our connection as one.  I don't know how soulmates are supposed to look, or be. But the way you treated me, The way you made me believe that– I too, am worthy of a soul's connection, That I too, am worthy just as I am, Changed me forever.  You were a balm  to my ever bruised soul. Every gesture of yours felt to me as if I was home– You made me feel worthy of being someone's home, too. A home so profound, I could have settled there for eternity. Ever since then, I've found trust within myself to face life gracefully.  Being seen so dearly by you, I felt adored. And such a never before feeling that I could experience was because of the reason that the person was YOU.  You, who have endured life's most torrential moments. Yet carry a heart so warm That every word you said– In every long and little conversations we had —touched my core. And awakened my soul. Ever since then, you have been living within me.  I don't know if I'm wrong For keeping you at my core, For letting my heart remain constantly connected to you, As I cannot wait for you to come back, and complete our story... But I do know this: You are the only soul I feel so eternally connected to. A flame unfadable...  Yours 3/12/24

(Chorus) सूरत है, शिरत हैं बेतहाशा खुबसूरत हैं. हैरत हैं, गैरत हैं सांसों की जरूरत हैं. रूहानी हैं, रुमानी हैं ये इश्क़ जावेदानी हैं.  (Antara -1 ) उनके चेहरे का नूर ,जैसे गैरत ए हूर निगाहे हया ,चश्म-ए-बद दूर. जिस हुस्ना का, ख़ुद खुदा भी मुरीद हैं  उस चांद की ज़िद है उस चांद की ज़िद है.  (Antara - 2) गर्मी के मौसम में, ठंडी हवा के जोके सा तु  बेशर्मी के इस जहां में, हया की मूरत सा तु  जो नजरों से दूर ,पर दिलके करीब है  उस चांद की ज़िद है. उस चांद की ज़िद है..            Lyricist:- Hiren Patel.

media_url: घर म्हणजे नव्हे घराच्या चार भिंती... प्रत्येकाची काहींना काही जुळलेली असते घराशी नाती...  घराची लक्ष्मी म्हणजे माझी प्रेमळ माता... घराचा कर्ताधर्ता म्हणजे माझे प्रेमळ पिता... घराची शोभा वाढविण्याकरिता सात लागतेच आम्हा भावंडाचे आता...  योग्य वेळी कठोरपणा दाखवणारे माझे वडील... सर्वांना योग्य तोच रस्ता दाखवतील...  आई मात्र माझी साधी आणि भोळी... प्रत्येकाच्या मनातले ओळखून वागणारी...  प्रत्येक परिस्थितीत समजून वागणारी... प्रत्येकाचे ऐकून घेणारी... समजूतदार आणि सगळ्यात मोठी ताई माझी...  भाऊ माझा आहे माळकरी... आमच्या पासून राहतो दुरी... आठवण येते त्याची प्रत्येक वेळी...  घरातले वातावरण फ्रेश राहावे म्हणून मी करते प्रयत्न... कित्येक वेळेला बोलणे खाल्ले तरीही वागते तशीच विचित्र...

media_url: {  ਰੁਬਾਈ }     ਸੂਰਜ ਨੇ ਅੰਬਰ ਰੁਸ਼ਨਾਇਆ,  ਬੱਦਲਾਂ ਨੇ ਮਲਹਾਰ ਸੀ ਗਾਇਆ,  ਹਵਾ ਨੇ ਛੇੜੀ ਤਾਰ ਜੋ ਦਿਲ ਦੀ ,  ਤਾਰਾ ਨੇ ਸੰਗੀਤ ਸੁਣਾਇਆ। ਤਾਰੇ ਸਾਰੇ ਹੀ ਵੇਖਣ ਆਏ, ਚੰਨ ਦੀ ਠੰਡਕ ਸੇਕਣ ਆਏ, ਧਰਤੀ ਦੇ ਸਭ ਹੋਏ ਦੁਆਲੇ, ਸਾਰੇ ਹੀ ਮੱਥਾ ਟੇਕਣ ਆਏ। ਤੰਜੀਫ਼ਾ ਕਰ ਦਿੱਤਾ ਮਨ ਦਾ, ਹੰਝੂ ਭਰਿਆ ਬਰਤਨ ਤਨ ਦਾ, ਅੱਖਾਂ ਫੜਕਣ ਸ਼ਾਨੇ ਕੰਬਣ, ਕੰਡਾ ਕੱਢ ਦਿੱਤਾ ਗਰਦਨ ਦਾ। ਖਿਲੀ ਕਲੀ ਤਾਂ ਪਤਾ ਲੱਗ ਗਿਆ, ਰੌਸ਼ਨੀ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ ਜਗ ਜੱਗ ਗਿਆ, ਮਹਿਕ ਫਿਜ਼ਾਵਾਂ ਰੰਗੀ ਹੋਈ, ਏ ਫੁੱਲ ਕੁਦਰਤ ਦੀ ਬਣ ਰਗ ਗਿਆ। ਉੱਤੋਂ ਪੈ ਜੇ ਭੂਰ ਜੇ ਕਿਧਰੇ, ਜਾਵੇ ਮੌਸਮ ਘੂਰ ਜੇ ਕਿਧਰੇ, ਅਰਸ਼ ਫਰਸ਼ ਤੇ ਧੂੰਮਾਂ ਪੈ ਜਾਣ, ਹੋ ਜੇ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਦੂਰ ਜੇ ਕਿਧਰੇ। ਆ ਵੇ 'ਸ਼ਾਹਾ' ਸਿਆਹ ਨਾ ਹੋਈਏ, ਖ਼ੁਦ ਦੇ ਕੀਤੇ ਤੇ ਹੁਣ ਨਾ ਰੋਈਏ, ਆ ਨੂਰ  ਪੁਰਨੂਰ ਕਰ ਦੇਈਏ, 'ਸੰਧੂ' ਨਫ਼ਰਤ ਦੇ ਬੀਜ ਨਾ ਬੋਈਏ।                                  ਸੰਧੂ ਸ਼ਾਹ ਜੀ ❣️
